title: Suggest Safety: Anti-Fake-Resolve Defense System
desc: 4-layer defense against fake bulk-resolves: git auto-commit on state change, pre-op snapshot, DataDir migration guard, suggest audit command
steps: Git auto-commit after every resolve/merge/submit (SuggestCommand.GitCommit.cs): chore(suggest): action ts
Pre-op snapshot before resolve/merge: suggestions.bak.{ts}.jsonl, 7d retention
DataDir migration guard on Eye start: copies suggestions.jsonl from legacy path if new DataDir empty
suggest audit: compares new vs legacy DataDir line counts, exit 1 on SPLIT-BRAIN

requirements.cmd: wkappbot suggest resolve ts note --skill X --evidence Y

requirements.expect: suggestions.jsonl auto-committed to git immediately; output includes git commit hash
requirements.prompt: suggest-safety: git auto-commit on state change safeguards defense. Commit e6ed3ad9.

requirements.expect: auto-copies from previous DataDir with [WARN] log line
requirements.prompt: suggest-safety: git auto-commit on state change safeguards defense. Commit e6ed3ad9.

author: claude
